description: Deleterious variant burden per carrier class. Regresses per-sample deleterious variant counts (from MODULE_CONSERVATION VESM/SIFT scoring) on inversion carrier status. Requires VALIDATED groups — a burden regression on UNCERTAIN or SUSPECT groups would be uninterpretable.
question: Q6

beta_hom_inv_vs_hom_ref.description: Regression coefficient: excess deleterious variants in HOM_INV relative to HOM_REF

vesm_score_class.description: which scoring layer provided the deleterious calls

selection_signal.description: selected = beta significant and in the direction consistent with relaxed selection inside the inversion
